comment: R0 public-axis proof measured on 2026-07-16. Geometry-active axes are advertised only after phase-stable component/counter topology across the normalized range, every public optical raster, and the declared analysis supersample.

policy.comparison: phase-stable components:holes against the default master

alert-circle/outline/weight.reason: The continuous axis changes or destabilizes binary component/counter topology at a declared optical proof sample.
alert-circle/outline/weight.exitCriteria: Restore phase-stable topology at every declared axis and raster sample, then remove this reviewed debt record.
